body: Hmm, I wonder if we should simply bake this into has_secure_password. That it automatically sets this up with the token. Because I'm finding that adding this into the model seems overly heavy. Especially since it only barely encapsulates one line from the mailer. Not sure the abstraction carries its own weight with that alone.
Actually I'm going to do that. Opening another PR for that shortly.
It is generated by has_secure_password now, yes. See https://github.com/rails/rails/blob/main/activemodel/lib/active_model/secure_password.rb#L224
